metadata.title: Planes Consolidation — Single Source of Truth for Shared Infrastructure
metadata.summary: Consolidate ~58,000 lines of duplicated infrastructure code into packages/planes/ (9 planes) and packages/ambient-protocols/ (12 protocol layers). Switch all 7 products to import from shared packages. Create observability plane. Wire Bridge and Pulse into ambient protocol stack. Fix LLM usage recording and A2A protocol compliance.

in_scope: packages/planes/ — 9 infrastructure planes (database, llm, storage, config, auth, rag, work-routing, supabase-core, observability)
packages/ambient-protocols/ — 12 protocol layers (transport, security, identity, payment, wallet, trust, encryption, resilience, negotiation, orchestration, audit, observability)
apps/ambient/pulse/api/ — remove local planes/llms/observability/auth/rbac/config/health/utils + fix direct createClient
apps/ambient/bridge/api/ — replace direct createClient with DATABASE_SERVICE, wire into protocol stack

summary: Eliminate ~58,000 lines of duplicated infrastructure. Every app imports from packages/planes/ and packages/ambient-protocols/.

steps.action: Fix trackUsage guard in base-llm.service.ts — remove context.userId gate so background/system tasks record usage. Change line 322 from `if (requestMetadata?.startTime && context.userId)` to `if (requestMetadata?.startTime)`. Apply to all 3 product copies (Forge, Compose, Pulse) and packages/planes/ shared copy.
Create OBSERVABILITY_SERVICE symbol and IObservabilityProvider interface in packages/planes/observability/observability.interface.ts. Define event types, tracking methods.
Create database-events provider by extracting the common event buffering + Supabase persistence pattern from product observability-events.service.ts (369 lines). This is the default provider.
Create OpenTelemetry provider by adapting ambient core's IObservabilityProvider OpenTelemetry implementation. Create file-log provider for development.

Create ObservabilityModule as @Global() NestJS module with env-driven provider selection (OBSERVABILITY_PROVIDER=opentelemetry|database_events|file_log). Update packages/planes/index.ts barrel exports.

Diff all 11 divergent files between Compose (apps/compose/api/src/planes/) and packages/planes/. Also diff Forge and Pulse copies to catch any other divergences. Merge the correct version into packages/planes/.

phases.label: Move Fine-Control LLM + Shared Infra to packages/planes/

steps.action: Copy apps/ambient/pulse/api/src/llms/ to packages/planes/llm/fine-control/. Convert all @/ path aliases to relative imports. Update packages/planes/llm/llm.module.ts to import fine_control from ./fine-control/llm.module.
Move remaining shared infra to packages/planes/: config/ → app-config/, auth/ → merge with auth/, rbac/ → rbac/, health/ → health/, utils/ → utils/. Convert @/ path aliases to relative imports.
Update packages/planes/index.ts barrel exports to include all new modules: fine-control LLM, observability, app-config, auth, rbac, health, utils. Verify the package builds cleanly.

phases.label: Switch Forge, Compose, Pulse to Shared Planes

steps.action: Forge: Delete local planes/, llms/, observability/, auth/, rbac/, config/, health/, utils/. Update app.module.ts to import from @orchestratorai/planes. Find-and-replace all import paths. Fix Forge's agents/shared/services/observability.service.ts to use OBSERVABILITY_SERVICE. Verify tsconfig resolves.

Compose: Delete local planes/, llms/, observability/, auth/, rbac/, config/, health/, utils/. Update app.module.ts to import from @orchestratorai/planes. Find-and-replace all import paths. Verify tsconfig resolves.

Pulse: Delete local planes/, llms/, observability/, auth/, rbac/, config/, health/, utils/. Update app.module.ts to import from @orchestratorai/planes. Find-and-replace all import paths. Fix direct createClient() calls in db-watcher.service.ts and triggers.controller.ts to use DATABASE_SERVICE. Verify tsconfig resolves.

phases.label: Switch Auth and Admin to Shared Planes

steps.action: Auth: Delete local planes/ (database, config, supabase-core, auth) and rbac/. Update app.module.ts to import DatabaseModule, ConfigProviderModule, ObservabilityModule from @orchestratorai/planes. Update all import paths.
Admin: Delete local planes/ (database, config, supabase-core) and observability/. Update app.module.ts to import from @orchestratorai/planes. Update all import paths.

Bridge: Delete database/bridge-database.service.ts and messaging/messaging-database.service.ts (direct createClient calls). Import DatabaseModule and ObservabilityModule from @orchestratorai/planes. Inject DATABASE_SERVICE and OBSERVABILITY_SERVICE. Update app.module.ts.

Move apps/ambient/core/shared-types/ to packages/ambient-types/. Move apps/ambient/core/shared-protocols/ to packages/ambient-protocols/. Delete Bridge's duplicate at apps/ambient/bridge/packages/shared-protocols/. Delete Pulse's duplicate at apps/ambient/pulse/packages/shared-protocols/. Update root tsconfig with @orchestratorai/ambient-protocols and @orchestratorai/ambient-types path aliases. Update root package.json workspaces.

phases.label: Wire Bridge into Ambient Protocol Stack

steps.action: Replace Bridge's custom security/signing.service.ts with ProtocolFactory security.service.ts + identity providers from @orchestratorai/ambient-protocols. Replace security/origin-validator.service.ts with trust/providers/allowlist.provider.ts. Replace protocol/bridge-protocol.service.ts circuit breaker with resilience/providers/circuit-breaker.provider.ts.

Wire payment gating into Bridge inbound flow: check capability pricing, issue invoice via configured payment provider (Stripe/x402/Lightning), gate processing until payment verified, return receipt in metadata. Wire audit chain (hash-chain provider) for immutable message logging.

Fix A2A response compliance: validate internal responses match TaskResponse envelope before returning to external agents. Return updated ExecutionContext. Validate inbound A2A extension fields (context, mode, payload, userMessage). Collect and surface observability metadata.

phases.label: Wire Pulse into Ambient Protocol Stack

steps.action: Refactor trigger-executor.service.ts executeRemote() to use ITransportProvider (a2a-jsonrpc) from @orchestratorai/ambient-protocols instead of bare fetch(). Wrap with IResilienceProvider (circuit-breaker + retry). Add IAuditProvider.append() for execution audit trail. Do the same for workflow-executor.service.ts.
Add SecurityValidationGuard + SchemaValidator to listeners.controller.ts for inbound A2A validation. Align AmbientEvent bus with IOrchestrationProvider pipeline.

Fix PredictorResult and RiskRunnerResult interfaces to return TaskResponse from @orchestrator-ai/transport-types. Change from { status, response, error, duration } to { success, mode, payload: { content, metadata }, context }.
Wrap controller responses in JSON-RPC 2.0 envelope. Validate remote A2A responses with type guards. Standardize SSE streaming format.

Build all 7 API products. Start each one and verify: Pulse cron triggers fire + LLM usage recorded + observability events captured. Forge agent dashboards load. Compose simple agents work. Auth login/token flow works. Bridge DATABASE_SERVICE + protocol stack + A2A routing works. Admin observability plane works. Query llm_usage for provider=ollama, model=qwen2.5:7b. Send test A2A through Bridge and verify response envelope + payment + audit trail. Verify Pulse returns standard TaskResponse.

quality_gate.description: Every checkpoint runs the full quality gate. No phase passes without all gates green.
steps: 1. Lint — ESLint with zero errors, zero warnings on all affected products
2. Build — Clean TypeScript compilation (tsc --noEmit) on all affected products
3. Unit Tests — All Jest/Vitest tests pass, no skips, no pending
4. E2E Tests — Real database, real services, real auth (no mocks per e2e-testing-skill)
5. Browser Tests — Playwright headless Chrome via MCP hitting running dev servers
6. Regression — No existing functionality broken (verified via browser tests)

tests: Login flow completes successfully
Dashboard renders with welcome message
Product launcher shows all entitled products
Navigation to each product works
Agent dashboard loads with data
Prediction dashboard renders charts/tables
Risk dashboard renders assessments
Agent conversation sends and receives messages
Agent list loads
Simple agent (context/RAG) can be created and run
Agent response renders in conversation window
Dashboard renders with status cards and data
Triggers page lists triggers with correct source types
Executions page shows history with trigger names, dates, durations (not Invalid Date/NaN)
Execution detail shows provider and model (not 'default')
Listeners page shows adapter status
LLM usage: query llm_usage table confirms records with provider=ollama, model=qwen2.5:7b
Health endpoint returns OK
Well-known agent.json serves valid agent card
A2A inbound request with valid signature gets routed and returns proper response envelope
A2A inbound request with invalid signature is rejected with JSON-RPC error
External agent registry lists registered agents
Message audit log records inbound/outbound messages
Login with test credentials returns valid JWT
Token refresh works
Entitlements endpoint returns product list
Invalid credentials rejected
Admin panel loads
Agent registry shows registered agents
Observability events appear in dashboard

checkpoints.label: LLM Usage Recording — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E: Start Pulse, wait for cron trigger that hits LLM, query llm_usage table for new records. Browser: Pulse executions page shows provider=ollama, model=qwen2.5:7b in execution detail.

checkpoints.label: Observability Plane — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests: packages/planes/ builds with new observability module, all providers resolve, unit tests pass for each provider.

checkpoints.label: Divergences Merged — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests: All 11 Compose divergent files merged into packages/planes/, no other product divergences found, shared package builds cleanly.

checkpoints.label: Shared Planes Package — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests: packages/planes/ builds cleanly with all new modules (fine-control LLM, observability, auth, rbac, health, utils, app-config). All unit tests pass.

checkpoints.label: Forge — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Forge API builds, starts, all tests pass. Browser tests verify agent dashboards load, prediction/risk dashboards render data, conversations work.

checkpoints.label: Compose — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Compose API builds, starts, all tests pass. Browser tests verify agent list loads, simple agent runs, response renders.

checkpoints.label: Pulse — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Pulse API builds, starts, no direct createClient calls. Browser tests verify dashboard, triggers, executions (with correct data), listeners all render.

checkpoints.label: Auth and Admin — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Both apps build, start, and pass full test suite. Browser tests verify Auth login/token and Admin panel + observability.

checkpoints.label: Bridge on Planes — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Bridge API builds and starts with DATABASE_SERVICE and OBSERVABILITY_SERVICE. Browser tests verify health, well-known, agent registry.

checkpoints.label: Ambient Protocols Package — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests: packages/ambient-protocols/ and packages/ambient-types/ build cleanly, duplicate copies deleted, all protocol provider unit tests pass.

checkpoints.label: Bridge Protocol Stack — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Bridge uses ProtocolFactory, payment gating works, A2A response compliance verified. Browser tests verify signed A2A request/response flow, invalid signature rejection, audit log entries.

checkpoints.label: Pulse Protocol Stack — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Pulse uses ITransportProvider, IResilienceProvider, IAuditProvider from ambient-protocols. Browser tests verify trigger executions complete with resilience (retry on failure).

checkpoints.label: Pulse A2A Compliance — Full Gate
checkpoints.description: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Browser: Processing services return standard TaskResponse, controllers wrap in JSON-RPC envelope. Browser tests verify execution detail shows proper payload.content and payload.metadata structure.

checkpoints.label: Final End-to-End — Full Gate (All Products)
checkpoints.description: Complete quality gate across ALL 7 products simultaneously: Lint + Build + Unit Tests + E2E + Full Browser Test Suite (all products in browser_test_suite). Zero failures. This is the final gate before the PRD is marked complete.

execution_strategy.notes: Phase 1 (LLM fix), Phase 2 (observability plane), and Phase 3 (merge divergences) can run in parallel. Phase 5 (Forge/Compose/Pulse), Phase 6 (Auth/Admin), and Phase 7 (Bridge) can run in parallel after Phase 4. Phase 9 (Bridge protocol) and Phase 10 (Pulse protocol) can run in parallel after Phase 8.
